items.reason: Adds core LogSampler coverage for normalization, hash-threshold decisions, random distribution, disabled fast path, and concurrent config reads.
Covers LogSampleConfigPb validation/population, request-only derivation, explicit override behavior, and previous-good retention.
Covers access/client/request_out sampling decisions, request-sampled access forcing, logSampled marker behavior, and access guard skips.
Covers the new Object/Stream/RequestOut AccessRecorder facades, deferred providers, sampled-out no-work behavior, and key formatting edge cases.
Covers LOG/PLOG/FATAL/CHECK integration, diagnostic supplement sampling, request-sampled diagnostic forcing, and background bypass.
Updates log macro tests for sampler-based stream evaluation and propagated request rejection behavior.
Updates RPC metadata tests for LOG_SAMPLE_UNDECIDED/ADMIT/REJECT semantics under the new request sampler.
Adds system coverage for cross-process sampling consistency and worker-to-client LogSampleConfigPb delivery.
Adds hot-path throughput and lazy access-record construction checks for sampler pass-through, reject, mixed, and sampled-out cases.
The PR changes sampler-specific Flags::UpdateFlagParameter transaction/rollback and explicit-state behavior, but this touched test only changes formatting and adds no assertions for that path.
